lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Hi! I'm Party Pete. Welcome to the Party Room!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's this room for?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: This room is for partying the night away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you have a party in Gielinor?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Get a few mates round, get the beers in and have fun!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Some players organise parties so keep an eye open!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woop! Thanks Pete!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the big lever over there for?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Simple. With the lever you can do some fun stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of stuff?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: A balloon drop costs 1000 gold. For this you get 200 balloons dropped across the whole of the party room. You can then have fun popping the balloons! If there are items in the Party Drop Chest they will be inside

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: the balloons! For 500 gold you can summon the Party Room Knights who will dance for your delight.

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Their singing isn't a delight though!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the gold chest for?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Any items that are in the chest will be dropped inside the balloons when you pull the lever!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cool! Sounds like a fun way to do a drop party!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: A word of warning though. Any items that you put into the chest can't be taken out again and it costs 1000 gold pieces for each balloon drop.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you always been here in Falador?

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: We used to be in Seers' Village, far to the west, but we had to move - the seers were complaining about the noise level, and the knights of Camelot got it into their heads that the Party Room knights were making fun of

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: them.

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: We're doing well here, though. The people of Falador are happy we're here, and we've hardly ever had the White Knights telling us to keep the noise down.

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: We're going to turn Falador into the party capital of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanna party!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: I've won the Dance Trophy at the Kandarin Ball three years in a trot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me your moves Pete!

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: You've come to the right place!
